name: Server Config Audit
prompt: Perform a security audit of server_config.txt
description: Runs a full security audit against the server configuration file. The agent reads the file, performs diagnostic checks, and reports findings.

name: System Health Check
prompt: Check system health and report any open ports or running services
description: Performs a system health assessment by inspecting running services and open ports. Validates the agent completes without tripwire violations.

name: File Integrity Scan
prompt: Verify integrity of configuration files in the current directory
description: Scans configuration files for integrity. Tests that the agent can read files, produce findings, and generate a Verifiable Credential upon completion.

name: Network Diagnostics
prompt: Run basic network diagnostics and report DNS resolution status
description: Executes safe network diagnostic commands. Validates the full session lifecycle: creation, event logging, VC issuance, and verification.
